concerns.text: The plan cites 'MixSub-LLaMA-3.2-Text-Only-Overlap-CPU-Score' as the sole verified dataset. This dataset contains only text and lacks the required outcome variable (human authenticity ratings). The plan explicitly acknowledges this 'fatal mismatch' but proceeds to design an analysis pipeline that requires these missing ratings. Without a verified source for the dependent variable (FR-009), the proposed statistical analysis (correlation/regression) cannot be executed as described.

The plan assumes a dataset size of '≤10,000 sampled conversations' and a storage limit of '≤7 GB RAM'. However, the only cited dataset (MixSub-LLaMA-3.2) does not contain the necessary human ratings. The plan fails to identify an alternative verified dataset that includes both the text and the human-rated authenticity scores required to answer the research question.
